title: SSA State-Agency Fiscal-Year Workload (SSA-SA-FYWL), All States, FY2001–FY2024
description: SSA State Agency fiscal-year workload file (SSA-SA-FYWL): per-state, per-federal-fiscal-year adult and SSI-child disability program statistics — population denominators, beneficiary counts, receipts, filing rates, favorable/all determinations, and favorable-determination (allowance) rates — for all states and territories, FY2001–FY2024. This is the authoritative source backing the master DDS statistics table's initial-claims-filed, initial-claims-disposed, and %-allowed columns (verified federal-FY match for 2013–2020).

columns.name: Update Date
columns.description: Date the source file was last updated by SSA (M/D/YYYY).

columns.name: State Code
columns.description: Two-letter state/territory code (note trailing space in raw values, e.g. 'AK ').

columns.name: Percent of Adult Population Receiving SSA Adult Disability Benefits
Percent of Population under age 18 Receiving SSI DC Benefits
All Determinations
columns.description: Total adult + child determinations for the state-year.

columns.name: Favorable Determination Rate
columns.description: Combined favorable-determination (allowance) rate; backs the master table's %-allowed column.

geographic_coverage: All U.S. states and territories (per-state rows)

source.title: SSA State Agency Fiscal Year Workload Data (SSA-SA-FYWL.csv)

notes: Authoritative: official SSA published workload file. 30 columns; rate columns are bare numbers, not percent strings. State Code values carry a trailing space in the raw file. 'Date' is the federal fiscal year. A '-LATEST' alias (ssa-sa-fywl-all-states-2001-LATEST.csv) mirrors the newest published vintage; this dated 2001-2024 file and the LATEST alias have identical data rows and differ only in the header row's asterisk/whitespace encoding (see the LATEST card).
